features: Global sidebar redesigned for Dispatch/Admin, Guard, and Client portals
Wider, more breathable sidebar layout inspired by generated mockup
Larger Co Pilot brand block and premium CP logo treatment
Improved user profile card with portal label, role badge, and online indicator
Rounded navigation items with larger icon boxes and less cramped spacing
Active nav state changed from harsh full-width bar to premium rounded command-center highlight
Operations/Account headings have cleaner spacing and visual separators
Sidebar nav remains scrollable but hides ugly native white scrollbars
Added compact platform status card above version badge
Version badge remains visible and cleaner at sidebar bottom
